productDisplayName: Puma Men's Mazarine Blue Polo T-shirt

The deep blue colour and the logo embroidered in golden thread add to the regal air of the t-shirt. The cotton fabric wicks away sweat and keeps you fresh and comfortable all day.Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual or semi-formal occasions.Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
